kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Page Screenshot will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

kw.name: Register Keyword To Run On Failure
kw.msg: Capture Page Screenshot will be run on failure.
kw.doc: Sets the keyword to execute, when a SeleniumLibrary keyword fails.

test.name: TC_001 Connexion Avec Utilisateur Problematique

kw.name: Open Browser No Popup
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: Evaluating expression '__import__("NoPopupOptions").get_driver_path("chrome")' failed: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'NoPopupOptions'

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword Unless
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED since RF 5.0. Use Native IF/ELSE or `Run Keyword If` instead.*

kw.status: Evaluating expression '__import__("NoPopupOptions").get_driver_path("chrome")' failed: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'NoPopupOptions'

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
